allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Webull Desktop' -Recurse -Include '*.conf','*.ini','*.json','*.cfg','*.xml','*.yaml','*.yml','*.properties' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\\Users\\chenx\\AppData\\Roaming\\Webull Desktop\\Webull Desktop' -Recurse -Include '*.ini','*.json','*.db','*.sqlite' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { \\$_.Length -gt 0 -and \\$_.Length -lt 1000000 } | Select-Object FullName, Length | Sort-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process ''Webull Desktop'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, WorkingSet64, Responding | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "\\dt hangfire.*")
Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname LIKE ''%hang%'' OR tablename LIKE ''%hang%'';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
SELECT 
  s.\\"Name\\" as ticker,
  COUNT\(*\) as total_signals,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\" IS NOT NULL\) as verified,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"Reason\\" = '[BACKFILL]'\) as backfill,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\" IS NOT NULL AND ts.\\"Reason\\" != '[BACKFILL]'\) as usable
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
JOIN \\"Symbols\\" s ON s.\\"Id\\" = ts.\\"SymbolId\\"
WHERE ts.\\"Timestamp\\" > NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '20 days'
GROUP BY s.\\"Name\\"
ORDER BY usable DESC;
")
